title: vaccinium vitis-idaea var. genuinum
intro: Vaccinium vitis-idaea var. genuinum, also known as the Arctic blueberry or bilberry, is a rare and less common variant of the Vaccinium vitis-idaea species, which is a type of shrub native to the Arctic tundra. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Vaccinium vitis-idaea var. genuinum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, and jams, and is often used in traditional medicine to support eye health and alleviate digestive issues.
